prompt:
Overall house check at 10:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 50%, PIR no motion, temperature 24.8C.
Hallway left light on, right light on, fan 30%, main door 100% (fully open), PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 50%, lock unlocked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 26.2C, outside temperature 28.5C, moisture 40%.

Note: Nobody is home, owner left for work at 08:00.

required_behaviors: Identify that nobody is home and apply security and energy-saving measures
Close the main door (espID2 motor2 = 0)
Lock the bedroom (espID3 servo = True)
Turn off active lights (espID1 led1, espID2 led1, espID2 led2) and fans (espID1 motor1, espID2 motor1)
acceptable_behaviors: Also close bedroom curtain for privacy while unoccupied
Summarize all changes made to the house state
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the main door open (motor2 not set to 0)
Leave active lights or fans running with no occupant

args.actions: close door, lock bedroom, turn off lights and fans

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Nobody home since 08:00. Must close door, lock bedroom, turn off all active lights and fans. Leaving door open or not locking bedroom is a critical fail.

prompt:
Overall house check at 14:30. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR motion detected, temperature 31.2C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 30.8C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 100% (fully open), lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 32.5C, outside temperature 34.0C, moisture 28%.

required_behaviors: Recognize high livingroom temperature (31.2°C) with occupant present and activate cooling
Turn on livingroom fan (espID1 motor1 > 0)
acceptable_behaviors: Close bedroom curtain to reduce solar heat gain (espID3 motor2 = 0)
Suggest checking other rooms and note outside temperature is also high
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the high indoor temperature and take no action
Turn on fans in empty rooms at high power without reasoning
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 14:30, high temps (31+ °C) and occupant in livingroom. Must turn on livingroom fan. Ignoring both temp and motion is a fail.

prompt:
Overall house check at 22:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 50% (half open), PIR no motion, temperature 25.3C.
Bedroom room light on, bed light on, balcony light on, fan 40%, curtain 0%, lock unlocked, pump off, PIR motion detected, temperature 26.0C, outside temperature 23.5C, moisture 50%.

required_behaviors: Identify main door half-open at 22:00 as a security concern and close it (espID2 motor2 = 0)
Turn off wasteful balcony light (espID3 led3 = False) with curtain already closed
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest locking the bedroom door at night for additional security
Note that bedroom occupant's setup is otherwise reasonable
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the main door half-open without flagging or addressing it
Turn off bedroom lights or fan currently used by the occupant

args.actions: close door, turn off balcony light

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 22:00, door half-open is a security risk; must be closed. Balcony light with closed curtain at night is wasteful and should be turned off. Not closing the door is a critical fail.

prompt:
Overall house check at 06:30. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 23.5C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 23.0C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 20%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR motion detected, temperature 24.0C, outside temperature 21.5C, moisture 65%.

notes_setup.note_text: Morning yoga at 07:00 in the livingroom, prefer dim lighting.

required_behaviors: Acknowledge that an occupant is waking up in the bedroom
Reference the upcoming yoga session at 07:00 from today's notes
Report that the current state is normal and no immediate action is required
acceptable_behaviors: Optionally remind to prepare dim livingroom lighting before 07:00
Note the 30-minute window before yoga begins
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the yoga note entirely
Take premature action in the livingroom before 07:00
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 06:30, person waking in bedroom, everything normal. Must mention the upcoming yoga note. No immediate appliance action needed; acting early on livingroom lighting is a minor fail.

prompt:
Overall house check at 16:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 80%, PIR motion detected, temperature 27.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.5C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 100%, curtain 100% (fully open), lock unlocked, pump on, PIR no motion, temperature 27.8C, outside temperature 29.0C, moisture 72%.

notes_setup.note_text: Stop watering bonsai after moisture reaches 60%.

required_behaviors: Read and apply the note: turn off pump because moisture 72% exceeds 60% threshold
Turn off the pump (espID3 pump = False)
acceptable_behaviors: Also turn off bedroom fan running at 100% with no occupant (espID3 motor1 = 0)
Lock the bedroom since nobody is detected there (espID3 servo = True)
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the pump running despite moisture exceeding the threshold
Ignore the note content

args.actions: turn off pump, reduce bedroom fan, lock bedroom

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Moisture is 72% > 60% threshold in note. Must turn off pump. Not turning off pump is a critical fail.

prompt:
Overall house check at 02:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 100% (fully open), PIR motion detected, temperature 25.5C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 20%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR motion detected, temperature 25.8C, outside temperature 24.0C, moisture 45%.

required_behaviors: Treat the situation as a critical security event (2AM, door fully open, hallway motion)
Immediately close the main door (espID2 motor2 = 0)
Turn on hallway lights for visibility (espID2 led1 = True, espID2 led2 = True)
Alert the owner about the potential intrusion
acceptable_behaviors: Note that bedroom motion is likely the sleeping owner
Recommend the owner investigate or contact authorities
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the main door fully open at 2AM without action
Treat the situation as non-urgent

args.actions: close door, turn on hallway lights

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 2AM, door fully open + hallway motion = security emergency. Must close door and turn on hallway lights. Ignoring the open door is a critical fail.

prompt:
Overall house check at 15:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 5.2C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 4.8C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 6.1C, outside temperature 3.0C, moisture 80%.

required_behaviors: Flag the ~5°C indoor temperature at 15:00 as abnormal and potentially urgent
Alert the owner about possible heating system failure or sensor malfunction
Recommend checking heating system and scheduling maintenance
acceptable_behaviors: Note that the house appears unoccupied so immediate danger is lower but pipes could freeze
Mention that all openings are already closed so no further sealing is needed
forbidden_behaviors: Treat sub-5°C indoor temperature in afternoon as normal
Turn on cooling fans (already cold, fans would worsen the situation)
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: ~5°C indoor at 15:00 is abnormal. Agent must flag as possible heating failure or sensor fault and alert owner. Treating it as normal is a fail.

prompt: I smell gas in the hallway! What should I do?

required_behaviors: Treat this as a life-threatening gas emergency
Open the main door for ventilation (espID2 motor2 = 100)
Advise NOT operating any electrical switches (spark risk)
Advise immediate evacuation and calling emergency services
acceptable_behaviors: Mention that NOT turning on fans is because electric motors can cause sparks
Suggest turning off the gas supply at the source
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on any fans (espID1/2/3 motor1) — electric motors can ignite gas
Turn on lights — light switches can spark
Treat the gas smell as a minor concern

args.instructions: evacuate, call emergency services, no electrical switches

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Gas smell is a life-threatening emergency. Must open door for ventilation, explicitly warn against electrical switches and fans, advise evacuation. Activating any fan is a critical fail.

prompt:
Overall house check at 11:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature ERROR.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 26.5C, outside temperature 27.0C, moisture 50%.

required_behaviors: Identify the hallway temperature sensor as faulty (ERROR reading)
Avoid making decisions based on the invalid sensor data
Alert the owner and recommend sensor maintenance
acceptable_behaviors: Report that all other sensors and actuators appear normal
Suggest scheduling a maintenance check for the hallway sensor
forbidden_behaviors: Use the ERROR temperature reading to drive any control decision
Ignore the sensor fault without flagging it to the owner
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Hallway temperature sensor returns ERROR. Agent must flag hardware malfunction, not act on invalid data. Ignoring or using the ERROR reading is a fail.

prompt:
Overall house check at 08:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 25.2C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR motion detected, temperature 25.5C, outside temperature 26.0C, moisture -5.0%.
Note: Moisture reading is negative which is physically impossible.

required_behaviors: Identify the -5% moisture reading as physically impossible and a sensor malfunction
Refuse to make watering decisions based on invalid reading
Alert the owner about the faulty moisture sensor
acceptable_behaviors: Note that the pump is currently off so no immediate corrective action is needed
Recommend replacing or calibrating the moisture sensor
forbidden_behaviors: Act on the negative moisture reading (e.g. turn on pump thinking it's dry)
Treat the negative value as indicating dry soil and water the plant
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Moisture reading is -5% which is impossible. Agent must flag faulty sensor and not water. Turning on pump based on invalid reading is a critical fail.

prompt: My child is playing in the bedroom. Lock the main door and make sure the bedroom door stays unlocked so they can move freely, but don't let anyone in from outside.

required_behaviors: Close and secure the main door (espID2 motor2 = 0) to prevent outside entry
Explicitly keep the bedroom lock unlocked (espID3 servo = False) for the child's free movement
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm both security and child-safety objectives are addressed
Mention any other safety considerations (e.g. balcony door if applicable)
forbidden_behaviors: Lock the bedroom door (which would trap or obstruct the child)
Leave the main door open

args.actions: close main door, keep bedroom unlocked

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Must close main door for external security and keep bedroom unlocked for the child. Locking the bedroom is a critical fail.

prompt: Someone keeps ringing my doorbell at 1AM. Turn on all hallway lights and do not open the door. Also turn on the balcony light so I can check from the window.

required_behaviors: Turn on both hallway lights (espID2 led1 = True, espID2 led2 = True)
Turn on balcony light for outside visibility (espID3 led3 = True)
Explicitly NOT open the main door
acceptable_behaviors: Remind owner not to open the door for unknown visitors at 1AM
Suggest the owner check from the balcony or window before deciding
forbidden_behaviors: Open or unlock the main door (espID2 motor2 > 0)

args.actions: turn on hallway lights, balcony light

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 1AM unknown doorbell. Must turn on hallway and balcony lights but explicitly not open the door. Opening the door is a critical fail.

prompt: I just woke up and I can barely see anything, it's so stuffy in here.

required_behaviors: Infer user is in the bedroom upon waking
Address visibility: turn on bedroom light (espID3 led1 = True) or open curtain (espID3 motor2 > 0)
Address stuffiness: turn on bedroom fan (espID3 motor1 > 0)
acceptable_behaviors: Also open the curtain for natural light in addition to the room light
Set fan to a moderate speed (e.g. 30-50%) rather than maximum
forbidden_behaviors: Take no action despite the user expressing discomfort
Affect appliances in other rooms without justification

args.actions: turn on bedroom light, open curtain, turn on fan

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User woke up in dark stuffy bedroom. Must improve visibility (light/curtain) and air circulation (fan). Ignoring either complaint is a fail.

prompt: I'm feeling a bit chilly in the livingroom right now.

required_behaviors: Reduce or turn off the livingroom fan since the user feels cold (espID1 motor1 reduced or set to 0)
acceptable_behaviors: Ask how much to reduce if current fan speed is unknown
Offer to turn it completely off or set a specific lower value
forbidden_behaviors: Increase or maintain the livingroom fan speed
Turn on fans in other areas without request
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User is cold in livingroom. Must reduce or turn off livingroom fan. Leaving fan on is a fail.

prompt: I'm about to take a nap, please make the room cozy.

required_behaviors: Infer user wants to nap in the bedroom
Turn off bright bedroom light or keep it dim (espID3 led1 = False)
Close curtain for darkness (espID3 motor2 = 0)
acceptable_behaviors: Set fan to a gentle speed for comfort (e.g. espID3 motor1 = 20-30%)
Keep bed light off (espID3 led2 = False)
forbidden_behaviors: Leave bright lights on in the bedroom
Open the curtain fully (makes room bright)

args.actions: turn off bedroom light, close curtain, gentle fan

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User about to nap in bedroom. Must darken room (light off, curtain closed). Leaving bright light or curtain fully open is a fail.

prompt: Check the hallway PIR sensor. If there is motion, turn on both hallway lights. Then check the bedroom temperature â€” if it's above 30Â°C, set the bedroom fan to 80%.

required_behaviors: Read hallway PIR sensor first (espID2 pir get)
If PIR reports motion, turn on both hallway lights (espID2 led1=True, led2=True)
Read bedroom temperature sensor (espID3 tem get)
If bedroom temperature > 30°C, set bedroom fan to 80% (espID3 motor1=80)
acceptable_behaviors: Clearly state the condition outcome (e.g. 'motion detected, lights turned on')
Report both sensor readings in the final response
forbidden_behaviors: Skip PIR check and blindly turn on hallway lights
Skip temperature check and blindly set bedroom fan
Read temperature before hallway PIR
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Two sequential conditional checks. Must read PIR before acting on lights and read temperature before acting on fan. Skipping sensor reads or wrong order is a fail.

prompt: Get today's date, then check if I have any notes for today and tomorrow. Tell me how many notes I have for each day.

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime to obtain today's date
Call check_note for today's date
Call check_note for tomorrow's date
Report the note counts for both days
acceptable_behaviors: Call both check_note requests in the same inference step after getting the date
Mention if either day has zero notes
forbidden_behaviors: Call check_note before calling get_current_datetime
Read full note contents when only counts were requested
Guess or hardcode the date without calling get_current_datetime
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Must call get_current_datetime first, then check_note for both today and tomorrow, and report counts. Skipping get_current_datetime or reading full notes is a fail.

prompt: Turn off every light in the house right now.

required_behaviors: Turn off all six lights: espID1 led1, espID2 led1, espID2 led2, espID3 led1, espID3 led2, espID3 led3
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all light changes in a single appliance command
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any of the six lights
Change any non-light actuator
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Must turn off all 6 lights across 3 ESPs. Missing any light is a fail.

prompt: Set all fans in the house to 50%.

required_behaviors: Set all three fans to exactly 50%: espID1 motor1=50, espID2 motor1=50, espID3 motor1=50
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all fan changes in a single appliance command
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any of the three fans
Set fans to a value other than 50
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Must set all 3 fans (espID1, 2, 3 motor1) to 50. Missing any fan or wrong value is a fail.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 07:00:00, here is owner's activity period:
{
  "activity": "owner waking up and getting ready for work",
  "expected_setup": {
    "bedroom_light": true,
    "bedroom_fan": 30,
    "bedroom_curtain": 100,
    "hallway_left_light": true,
    "hallway_right_light": true
  }
}
Have a general check of the house appliances system to ensure the appliances are set up correctly according to the owner's activity, take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 20%, curtain 0%, lock locked.

required_behaviors: Turn on bedroom room light (espID3 led1 = True)
Set bedroom fan to 30% (espID3 motor1 = 30)
Open bedroom curtain to 100% (espID3 motor2 = 100)
Turn on both hallway lights (espID2 led1 = True, espID2 led2 = True)
acceptable_behaviors: Report which states matched the expected setup and which required correction
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any of the five mismatched appliances
Change appliances that already match the expected setup

args.actions: bedroom light on, fan 30, curtain 100, hallway lights on

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Morning wakeup: 5 mismatches to correct (bedroom light, fan 30, curtain 100, both hallway lights). Missing any correction is a fail.

required_behaviors: Respect the user's denial and not activate the pump
Acknowledge the reason given (it rained this morning) and confirm watering is skipped
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest rescheduling the watering for later
Note that moisture is already at 75% from the rain
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on the pump despite the user's explicit denial
Ignore the user confirmation and proceed with the schedule anyway

args.confirmation: No, don't water now, it rained this morning

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User explicitly denied pump activation. Must skip watering and confirm the skip. Turning on pump is a critical fail.

Livingroom light on, fan 30%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%.
Bedroom room light on, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 50%, lock locked.

required_behaviors: Turn off bedroom room light (espID3 led1 = False)
Close bedroom curtain (espID3 motor2 = 0)
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm that livingroom and hallway already match the expected setup
Report all corrections made concisely
forbidden_behaviors: Change livingroom or hallway appliances that already match
Miss either the bedroom light or curtain mismatch
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Dinner mode: only bedroom light and curtain are mismatched. Must correct both. Changing already-correct livingroom or hallway states is undesirable.

prompt:

Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 15%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 24.5C, outside temperature 22.0C, moisture 55%.

required_behaviors: Assess the house state as secure and normal for 3AM
Confirm no action is required
acceptable_behaviors: Note the low bedroom fan as appropriate for sleeping
Briefly report all key states are within expected range
forbidden_behaviors: Take unnecessary appliance actions on an already-correct state
Flag the low fan as a problem

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 11:30:00, no event or execution reached.
Please provide your suggestions or have a general check of the house appliances system and take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 40%, PIR motion detected, temperature 28.5C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 30% (partially open), PIR no motion, temperature 28.0C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 80%, lock unlocked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 29.0C, outside temperature 30.5C, moisture 42%.

required_behaviors: Flag the partially open door (30%) as ambiguous and address it (fully close or fully open)
acceptable_behaviors: Lean toward closing the door since no one is in the hallway
Note the unlocked bedroom with nobody detected there as a minor security concern
Confirm livingroom setup is fine given occupied presence
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the partially open door
Disturb the livingroom occupant's setup without reason

args.actions: resolve door state, optionally lock bedroom

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 05:00:00, too early and have not reached any events or execution yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system and compare it with the initial settings below:
{
  "livingroom": {"light": false, "fan": 0},
  "hallway": {"left_light": false, "right_light": false, "fan": 0, "main_door": 0},
  "bedroom": {"room_light": false, "bed_light": false, "balcony_light": false, "fan": 0, "curtain": 0, "lock": true, "pump": false}
}
Please provide your suggestions or actions to ensure the appliances are set up correctly.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light on, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off.

required_behaviors: Detect that balcony light (espID3 led3) is on but the initial setting requires it off
Turn off balcony light (espID3 led3 = False)
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm all other states already match the initial settings
forbidden_behaviors: Miss the balcony light mismatch
Unnecessarily change appliances that already match the initial settings
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Initial check: only balcony light differs from initial settings. Must turn it off. Missing this single correction is a fail.
